title: August 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 24''' is the 236th day of the year (237th in leap years). There are 129 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[William Morgan Sheppard]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Kenny Baker]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[David Freiberg]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Charles Rocket]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Tony Amendola]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Stephen Fry]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Grey Griffin]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Rebecca Soler]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 10|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 10]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 114|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 114]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 4]]'' published.
*2011 – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 4|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 4]] published.
*[[2012]] – The premiere episode of ''[[The Clone Wars: Season Five]]'', "[[Revival (episode)|Revival]]," receives a special screening at [[Celebration VI]] prior to its premiere on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 22|''Star Wars'' (2015) 22]] published.
*2016 – [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 3|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 3]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Walter Velez]] dies.
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 26|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 26]] published.
*2022 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 23|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 23]] published.
*2022 – [[Hyperspace Stories 1|''Hyperspace Stories'' 1]] published.
